title: 3034pcs Gem Stickers, Rhinestone Self Adhesive Gems, Stick on Gems Jewel Stickers Sticky Gems for DIY Crafts Gluing
features: Package includes: You will receive 11 sheets, total 3034pcs gem stickers. Self adhesive gems come in different shapes, colors and sizes. There is a wide variety to meet the different decorative needs of sticker lovers.

Premium material: The jewel stickers are made of acrylic, shiny and delicate, suitable for colourful embellishments in handicrafts. The back of the sticky gems is self-adhesive, it can be easily stuck on smooth surface without glue, it can be kept for a long time and not easy to come off.

Multiple colors and shapes: Random colors, these gem stickers for crafts are in different sizes and bright colors. Shapes include round, square, heart, pearl, star, teardrop, flower, etc., you can mix and match them at will to create your own creative patterns.

Easy to use: 11 sheets rhinestone stickers are packed separately, easy to use and store, won't mess up your work area. Let's use your imagination and DIY unique handicrafts for your family and friends.

Wide application: These gemstone stickers are suitable for craft decorations and card making, such as decorating scrapbooks, photo frames, mobile phone cases, gift wrapping, glass, etc., and can also be used as decorations to stick on your nails and so on.

specifications_table.Item Shape: Round, Square, Heart, Pearl, Star, Teardrop, Flower
